project.name: xomda JVM integrations aggregator
project.description: Maven multi-module aggregator for the JVM-side xomda integrations. Covers Maven modules only — the Gradle plugin and the IntelliJ plugin live alongside under integrations/jvm/ but build with Gradle and must be invoked separately. The Eclipse plugin has its own aggregator pom under integrations/jvm/eclipse/. Use `pnpm test:jvm` from the repo root to run everything.
